title: citrus × aurantium subsp. natsudaidai
intro: Citrus × aurantium subsp. natsudaidai, also known as the satsuma mandarin or natsudaidai, is a citrus plant that is a natural hybrid of Citrus unshiu and Citrus reticulata. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve stress and anxiety, and act as a natural diuretic. The health benefits of Citrus × aurantium subsp. natsudaidai include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
